Open source
Open-source combo docs, starting with Sky Striker

Open Combo Codex

A sleek, fast, tournament-ready Yu-Gi-Oh! combo browser where every route is easy to inspect, copy, favorite, and improve through Markdown pull requests.

YGO Combo Bible

15

Live combos

15

Markdown files

19

Starter cards

3

Future engines

Built for quick event checks: filter by starter, copy a line, favorite it, then submit clean Markdown improvements later.

Engines

Pick a library

Ordered by the current YGOPRODeck tournament archetype ranking when available, with unranked roadmap engines last.

Featured

Start here tonight

The highest-value Sky Striker routes for learning the deck quickly.

Beginner Combos

Basic Engage into Shizuku Setup

Shizuku, Raye in GY, and an End Phase search that turns Engage into a stable control setup.

Beginner Combos

Raye Starter into Full Setup

Sky Striker Ace - Shizuku in the Extra Monster Zone, Raye in GY, one searched interaction or engine spell for follow-up.

Main Deck Starters

Engage + Hornet Drones Kagari Loop

Shizuku with a recovered spell and an End Phase search, often representing multiple cards of advantage from one starter.

Combos

Browse the codex

Filters

10 visible combos

Deck Lists / Resources

Practice from a real shell

Banlist-sensitive

Sky Striker Core

A compact engine package to start testing lines before tuning flex slots for a format.

Main Deck Core

  • - 3 Sky Striker Ace - Raye
  • - 1-2 Sky Striker Ace - Roze
  • - 1 Sky Striker Mobilize - Engage!
  • - 1 Sky Striker Mecha - Hornet Drones
  • - 2-3 Sky Striker Maneuver - Linkage!
  • - 1 Sky Striker Airspace - Area Zero
  • - 1 Sky Striker Mecha Modules - Multirole
  • - 2 Sky Striker Mecha - Widow Anchor
  • - 1 Sky Striker Mecha - Shark Cannon

Extra Deck Core

  • - 1 Sky Striker Ace - Kagari
  • - 3 Sky Striker Ace - Shizuku
  • - 2 Sky Striker Ace - Hayate
  • - 1 Sky Striker Ace - Kaina
  • - 1 Sky Striker Ace - Zeke
  • - New support slots: Zero / Amatsu as format testing allows

Sample Control Shell

A baseline list shape for practicing tournament pacing, not a locked recommendation.

Interaction Suite

  • - Effect Veiler / Infinite Impermanence
  • - Ash Blossom & Joyous Spring
  • - Triple Tactics Talent / Thrust
  • - Book of Eclipse or board breaker slots

Consistency And Utility

  • - Reinforcement of the Army
  • - Terraforming if legal
  • - Upstart Goblin where legal
  • - Called by the Grave where legal

Helpful links

Official Forbidden & Limited List

Check legality before practicing a tournament line.

YGOPRODeck Card Database

Fast lookups for card text, printings, and public image URLs.

Contribution Guide

Add or correct combos by editing Markdown files in the repo.

Open-source by design

Combos are Markdown, not locked content

Open Combo Codex is built so players can correct lines, add variants, and publish new engines by editing plain `.md` files in a GitHub repo. The app turns those files into searchable combo cards.

Add a file

Create `content/combos/sky-striker/new-line.md`.

Use frontmatter

Fill title, starters, steps, notes, and end board.

Open a PR

Reviewers can audit one combo at a time.

Open Combo Codex. For educational purposes. Combos may vary by banlist, region, simulator, and format.

Yu-Gi-Oh! card names and images belong to their respective owners.
